AggregationEvents.description: Packaging hierarchy operations extending EPCIS AggregationEvent

aggregation_event_id.description: Unique identifier for aggregation operation - aligns with EPCIS eventID

aggregation_event_id_value.description: Value holder for aggregation event ID

aggregation_location.description: GLN where operation occurred - aligns with EPCIS bizLocation

aggregation_timestamp.description: When packing/unpacking happened - aligns with EPCIS eventTime

aggregation_type.description: ADD for packing DELETE for unpacking - uses EPCIS Action directly

biz_step.description: Business step like packing commissioning etc - uses CBV directly

child_identifiers.description: Child EPCs being aggregated/disaggregated using EPCIS childEPCs structure

disposition.description: Business condition of aggregation - aligns with EPCIS disposition

parent_identifier.description: Container pallet or case EPC being packed/unpacked - aligns with EPCIS parentID

read_point.description: Specific read point where aggregation occurred - EPCIS readPoint

BoundaryDefinition.description: Goal-and-scope, system boundary, scenario, allocation, or model definition used as the reference for a boundary-defined result

allocation_rule_value.description: Allocation, partitioning, substitution, cut-off, or burden-sharing rule applied in the boundary definition

boundary_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a boundary, scope, scenario, or modelling reference definition

boundary_name_value.description: Name of the boundary, scope, scenario, or modelling definition

boundary_type_value.description: Type of boundary or scope definition

characterization_model_value.description: Characterization model, factor set, time horizon, scenario, or model version used to convert inputs into the reported result

data_source_scope_value.description: Temporal, geographical, technological, or population scope of the data sources used by the boundary definition

excluded_processes_value.description: Processes, stages, flows, compartments, or elements excluded from the boundary

goal_scope_definition_value.description: Goal and scope definition or equivalent statement that defines the assessed value

impact_method_value.description: Impact assessment, characterization, scoring, or calculation method used for a modelled result

included_processes_value.description: Processes, stages, flows, compartments, or elements included in the boundary

procedure_standard_value.description: Standardized procedure, protocol, guide, or method document

procedure_version_value.description: Version, edition, revision, or publication date of the procedure

traceability_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a certificate, report, procedure, dataset, standard, or software record

calibration_certificate_identifier_value.description: Identifier of the calibration certificate or equivalent evidence record

calibration_certificate_url_value.description: URL for the calibration certificate or equivalent evidence record

calibration_date_value.description: Date on which the calibration was performed

calibration_due_date_value.description: Date by which recalibration is due

calibration_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a calibration, comparison, verification, or check record

calibration_laboratory_accreditation_val.description: Accreditation identifier, scope, or body associated with the calibration provider

calibration_laboratory_value.description: Laboratory, organization, or facility that performed the calibration

calibration_method_value.description: Calibration method, procedure, comparison method, or protocol used

calibration_result_value.description: Calibration result, correction, factor, or outcome statement

calibration_status_value.description: Validity or acceptance status of the calibration record

traceability_environmental_conditions_va.description: Environmental, operating, or procedural conditions relevant to traceability

traceability_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a certificate, report, procedure, dataset, standard, or software record

ComparabilityAssessment.description: Assessment of whether two reported values are metrologically comparable through the same reference basis, measurand definition, method, or boundary

comparability_assessment_identifier_valu.description: Identifier for an assessment of metrological comparability

comparability_decision_value.description: Decision about whether the compared results are metrologically comparable

comparability_rationale_value.description: Rationale for the comparability decision, including relevant mismatches or limitations

left_traceability_reference_value.description: Reference to the first traceability statement, chain, or basis being compared

right_traceability_reference_value.description: Reference to the second traceability statement, chain, or basis being compared

same_measurand_definition_value.description: Whether the compared results use the same measurand or operational definition

same_method_or_boundary_value.description: Whether the compared results use the same method-defined or boundary-defined reference

same_reference_basis_value.description: Whether the compared results are traceable to the same reference basis

traceability_uncertainty_reference_value.description: Reference to an uncertainty statement, uncertainty budget, or uncertainty component associated with this traceability record

ComparabilityDecisionEnum.title: ComparabilityDecisionEnum

ComparisonAssessment.description: Assessment of whether two uncertainty-backed values can be compared meaningfully

additional_uncertainty_component.description: Additional uncertainty component introduced because of comparison mismatch

additional_uncertainty_rationale_value.description: Rationale for adding or expanding uncertainty because of traceability, boundary, method, or data quality mismatch

boundary_match_value.description: Assessment of whether method, scope, or system boundaries are compatible for comparison

comparison_decision_value.description: Decision on whether a direct or conditional comparison is meaningful

comparison_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a comparison assessment involving uncertainty statements

left_statement_reference_value.description: Reference to the first uncertainty statement in a comparison

right_statement_reference_value.description: Reference to the second uncertainty statement in a comparison

traceability_match_value.description: Assessment of whether traceability bases are compatible for comparison

uncertainty_statement_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the uncertainty statement

ComparisonDecisionEnum.description: Decisions about whether uncertainty-backed values can be compared

competence_basis_value.description: Basis for competence, such as accreditation, proficiency testing, validation, authorization, or quality management system

competence_provider_value.description: Laboratory, person, organization, facility, or software provider whose competence is documented

competence_scope_value.description: Scope of competence, accreditation, validation, or authorization

competence_status_value.description: Status of the competence or accreditation record

first_quantity_reference_value.description: Reference to the first quantity in a correlation or covariance relationship

return_documentation.description: URI references to return authorization shipping labels RMA documents

return_location.description: Location where entities (products, materials, batches, commodities) can be returned - GLN identifier

return_method.description: How entity (product, material, batch, commodity) can be returned

DataCharacterization.description: Characterization of the assessed data, including source, provenance, scope, collection method, versioning, and preprocessing

collection_end_date_value.description: End date for the data collection or generation period

collection_method_value.description: Method, protocol, procedure, system, or workflow used to collect or generate the data

collection_protocol_value.description: Documented collection protocol, questionnaire, instrument, test method, API, or extraction logic

collection_start_date_value.description: Start date for the data collection or generation period

data_characterization_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a data characterization record

data_domain_value.description: Domain or subject area of the data, such as product specification, LCA, diagnostics, compliance, or circularity

data_provider_value.description: Provider, owner, custodian, supplier, laboratory, or organization responsible for the data

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

data_quality_traceability_reference_valu.description: Reference to a metrological traceability statement, chain, method, calibration, or boundary definition related to this data quality assessment

data_quality_unit_value.description: Unit associated with a quantitative value or metric

data_source_identifier_value.description: Identifier for the assessed data source, dataset, value source, or information source

data_source_name_value.description: Name of the assessed data source, dataset, value source, or information source

data_version_value.description: Version, edition, revision, release date, or snapshot identifier for the assessed data

geographic_coverage_value.description: Geographic coverage or spatial representativeness of the data

harmonization_description_value.description: Harmonization, mapping, coding, unit conversion, or schema alignment applied to combine or compare data

population_or_scope_value.description: Target population, inference scope, product scope, material scope, or process scope represented by the data

preprocessing_description_value.description: Preprocessing, cleaning, transformation, imputation, filtering, or normalization applied before assessment

provenance_description_value.description: Narrative provenance of the data, including who collected it, when, under which protocol, and how it was processed

sample_size_value.description: Sample size, number of observations, number of records, or number of contributing sources

technological_coverage_value.description: Technological, product, process, or system coverage represented by the data

temporal_coverage_value.description: Temporal coverage or period represented by the data

update_frequency_value.description: Update cadence or refresh frequency for the data

variable_definition_value.description: Definition of the variable, field, indicator, category, or qualitative construct being assessed

DataCharacterization.title: DataCharacterization

DataErasureEvidence.description: Auditable evidence of secure data erasure performed on data-bearing media. Harmonised with diagnostic-results DataSanitization.

document_reference.description: URI reference to the erasure certificate document or supporting evidence

erasure_identifier.description: Unique identifier or certificate/report ID of the erasure activity

erasure_method.description: Erasure method applied (e.g. cryptographic erase, overwrite, degauss, physical destruction)

erasure_result.description: Outcome of the erasure activity (e.g. PASS, FAIL, INCOMPLETE)

erasure_standard.description: URI reference to the erasure standard followed (e.g. NIST SP 800-88, IEEE 2883)

erasure_timestamp.description: Timestamp when erasure was completed ISO 8601 format

erasure_tool.description: Tool or software (name and version) used to perform the erasure

media_serial_number.description: Serial number of the wiped data-bearing media or device

media_serial_number_value.description: Value holder for media serial number

operator.description: Technician, organisation, or automated system that performed the erasure

DataQualityAssessment.description: Reusable assessment describing the quality, fitness for purpose, diagnostics, and improvement needs of data used by CE-RISE models

assessment_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the data quality assessment

assessment_purpose_value.description: Purpose for which the data quality assessment is performed

assessor_value.description: Person, organization, system, or workflow responsible for the data quality assessment

data_characterization.description: Characterization of the assessed data and its provenance

data_quality_applies_to_class_value.description: Class in an external model to which this data quality assessment applies

data_quality_applies_to_model_value.description: Name, URI, or namespace of the external data model to which this data quality assessment applies

data_quality_applies_to_record_value.description: Identifier of the external record, object, dataset, or passport entry to which this data quality assessment applies

data_quality_applies_to_slot_value.description: Slot or attribute in an external model to which this data quality assessment applies

data_quality_applies_to_value_identifier.description: Identifier of a specific value object when the target model gives value-level identifiers

data_quality_applies_to_value_path_value.description: JSONPath, XPath, RDF path, or other pointer to the value to which this data quality assessment applies

data_quality_assessment_date_value.description: Date and time when the data quality assessment was issued or last updated

data_quality_assessment_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a data quality assessment that can be referenced from another CE-RISE model

data_quality_assessment_label_value.description: Human-readable label for the data quality assessment

data_quality_assessment_status_value.description: Lifecycle status of the data quality assessment

data_quality_assessment_type_value.description: Type of data quality assessment being documented

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

data_quality_profile.description: Data quality profile associated with an assessment

data_quality_standards_applied_value.description: Standard, guide, protocol, or scoring framework applied in the data quality assessment

data_quality_traceability_reference_valu.description: Reference to a metrological traceability statement, chain, method, calibration, or boundary definition related to this data quality assessment

data_quality_uncertainty_reference_value.description: Reference to an uncertainty statement, uncertainty budget, or uncertainty component informed by this data quality assessment

fitness_for_purpose_value.description: Overall statement of whether the data are fit for the stated purpose

intended_use_value.description: Intended use, decision context, or analytical purpose for which data fitness is assessed

quality_diagnostics.description: Data-quality diagnostic runs, checks, or analyses

quality_issues.description: Data quality issues, limitations, anomalies, or risks

remediation_actions.description: Remediation, mitigation, containment, or improvement actions

uncertainty_translation.description: DQA-to-uncertainty translation associated with an assessment or profile

DataQualityAssessmentTypeEnum.title: DataQualityAssessmentTypeEnum

DataQualityEvidenceReference.description: Supporting evidence record for a data quality assessment, score, diagnostic, issue, remediation action, uncertainty translation, or aggregation

data_quality_evidence_provider_value.description: Provider, author, laboratory, supplier, or organization responsible for supporting evidence

DataQualityFramework.description: Root container for data quality assessments and supporting records

data_characterizations.description: Data characterization records available for reuse by one or more assessments

data_quality_assessments.description: Reusable data quality assessments that can be embedded or referenced by other CE-RISE data models

data_quality_evidence_references.description: Evidence records referenced by the data quality framework

data_quality_profiles.description: Data quality profiles available for reuse by one or more assessments

quality_aggregations.description: Aggregations of data quality assessments, profiles, criteria, metrics, or uncertainty translations

quality_diagnostics.description: Data-quality diagnostic runs, checks, or analyses

quality_issues.description: Data quality issues, limitations, anomalies, or risks

quality_metrics.description: Quality metrics or diagnostic metrics used by profiles, criteria, or diagnostics

remediation_actions.description: Remediation, mitigation, containment, or improvement actions

uncertainty_translations.description: Translations from data quality scores to uncertainty information

DataQualityProfile.description: Profile aggregating data quality criteria, scores, flags, and confidence for a dataset, value, source, or information product

aggregation_method_value.description: Method used to aggregate criterion scores or lower-level assessments into a profile

confidence_level_value.description: Confidence level implied by the data quality assessment

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

data_quality_profile_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a data quality profile aggregating one or more criterion assessments

data_quality_profile_name_value.description: Human-readable name of a data quality profile

limiting_criteria_value.description: Criterion or criteria that limit the overall score, confidence, or decision flag

overall_numeric_score_value.description: Numeric quality score when the score is represented as a number

overall_quality_score_value.description: Overall pedigree score for the assessed data, typically from 1 very reliable to 4 dubious

profile_summary_value.description: Summary of the data quality profile, including main strengths and weaknesses

quality_flag_value.description: Operational decision flag derived from the quality profile

uncertainty_translation.description: DQA-to-uncertainty translation associated with an assessment or profile

EntityHistory.description: EPCIS-compatible base event structure for complete lifecycle audit trail of products, materials, batches, or commodities

biz_location.description: Business location where objects are expected following event EPCIS bizLocation

certification_info.description: URI references to relevant certification documents or standards

disposition.description: Business state of objects - aligns with EPCIS disposition concept

error_declaration.description: Declaration that this event is in error EPCIS errorDeclaration

event_identifier.description: Unique identifier for each event - aligns with EPCIS eventID concept

event_location.description: GLN or URI for location - aligns with EPCIS readPoint/bizLocation concepts

event_time_zone_offset.description: Time zone offset from UTC like +01:00 or -05:00

event_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone - aligns with EPCIS eventTime concept

event_type.description: Uses EPCIS EventType vocabulary directly - ObjectEvent TransactionEvent etc

read_point.description: Specific location where event occurred EPCIS readPoint

sensor_metadata.description: IoT sensor data using EPCIS 2.0 SensorReport structure

MeasurandSpecification.description: Operational specification of the measurand, quantity of interest, method, conditions, and boundary

decision_rule_value.description: Decision rule used for conformity assessment or comparison when uncertainty is considered

measurement_method_value.description: Measurement, calculation, test, or modelling method used to obtain the value

measurement_model_value.description: Measurement model, calculation model, statistical model, or equation relating inputs to the measurand

method_standard_value.description: Standardized method or protocol defining the measurand or evaluation procedure

method_version_value.description: Version, edition, date, or revision of the method used

object_or_matrix_value.description: Object, material matrix, product, population, or system to which the measurand applies

reference_conditions_value.description: Reference conditions to which the reported value is corrected or intended to apply

rounding_rule_value.description: Rounding or reporting rule applied to the value and uncertainty

sample_definition_value.description: Definition of the sample, specimen, item, batch, or population subset used for the evaluation

sampling_frame_value.description: Sampling frame, location, period, state, or population basis for the measurand

system_boundary_value.description: System boundary, scope, or modelling boundary relevant to the measurand

MetrologicalTraceability.description: Root container for metrological traceability statements and supporting records

boundary_definitions.description: Boundary, goal-and-scope, scenario, or model definitions used as traceability references

calibration_records.description: Calibration, comparison, verification, or check records that support traceability

comparability_assessments.description: Assessments of whether traceability statements support meaningful comparison

competence_records.description: Competence, accreditation, validation, or quality system records supporting traceability

measurement_procedures.description: Measurement, calculation, sampling, calibration, analytical, or modelling procedures used for traceability

measurement_standards.description: Measurement standards, artefacts, instruments, and realizations used in traceability

reference_entities.description: Reference entities, standards, methods, instruments, datasets, or organizations used in traceability

reference_materials.description: Reference materials and certified reference materials used in traceability

traceability_bases.description: Reference bases used to establish metrological traceability

traceability_chains.description: Traceability chains or networks available for reuse by one or more traceability statements

traceability_evidence_references.description: Evidence records referenced by the metrological traceability model

traceability_statements.description: Reusable traceability statements that can be embedded or referenced by other CE-RISE data models

MetrologicalTraceability.title: MetrologicalTraceability

OwnershipEvent.description: Legal ownership and custody transfers extending EPCIS TransactionEvent

chain_of_custody_reference_value.description: Value holder for custody chain references

currency.description: Currency code for transfer value using ISO 4217 standard

linked_entity_identifier.description: Reference to entities (products, materials, batches, commodities) being transferred - aligns with EPCIS epcList concept

linked_entity_identifier_value.description: Value holder for linked entity identifier

new_owner.description: Destination party GLN - aligns with EPCIS destination concept

ownership_documentation.description: Digital references EPCIS bizTransactionList URIs to documents

ownership_status.description: Legal status of ownership after transfer DPP extension beyond EPCIS

previous_owner.description: Source party GLN - aligns with EPCIS source concept

quantity_transferred.description: Quantity transferred using EPCIS QuantityElement structure

transfer_date.description: Precise timestamp of ownership change - aligns with EPCIS eventTime concept

transfer_location.description: Physical location GLN - aligns with EPCIS bizLocation concept

transfer_type.description: Uses CBV Business Transaction Type vocabulary directly - po desadv inv rma etc

transfer_value_value.description: Value holder for transfer monetary value

OwnershipEvent.title: OwnershipEvent

OwnershipStatusEnum.description: Legal status of ownership - DPP extension beyond EPCIS standard
OwnershipStatusEnum.title: OwnershipStatusEnum

PackagingLevelEnum.description: Levels in packaging hierarchy - aligns with EPCIS packaging concepts
PackagingLevelEnum.title: PackagingLevelEnum

PhysicalCustodyEvent.description: A single in-workshop physical custody handoff of an entity, distinct from legal ownership transfer. A sequence of these events forms the granular physical custody chain (e.g. intake to storage to bench to data wipe to QA to resale).

custody_event_identifier.description: Unique identifier for the physical custody event

custody_event_identifier_value.description: Value holder for custody event identifier

custody_evidence.description: URI references to custody evidence such as handoff records, signatures, or photos

custody_location.description: Physical location of custody - GLN or internal location identifier

custody_stage.description: Workshop stage at which the entity is held

custody_timestamp.description: When the entity entered this custody stage ISO 8601 format

holder.description: Person, station, or department physically holding the entity

linked_entity_identifier.description: Reference to the entity in custody - aligns with EPCIS epcList concept

linked_entity_identifier_value.description: Value holder for linked entity identifier

seal_status.description: Whether the entity or its packaging is sealed or open at this custody stage

transfer_reason.description: Reason for the custody transfer or handoff

PhysicalCustodyEvent.title: PhysicalCustodyEvent

ProcedureRoleEnum.description: Roles of procedures in a traceability statement
ProcedureRoleEnum.title: ProcedureRoleEnum

PropagationAnalysis.description: Analysis used to propagate input uncertainties to an output uncertainty statement

analysis_timestamp_value.description: Date and time when an analysis was performed

model_equation_value.description: Equation, model expression, or model reference used for propagation

output_distribution.description: Output probability distribution produced by propagation

propagation_identifier_value.description: Identifier for an uncertainty propagation analysis

random_seed_value.description: Random seed used for a stochastic simulation, when recorded

scenario_uncertainties.description: Scenario-specific uncertainty results or structural alternatives

sensitivity_results.description: Sensitivity results identifying drivers of output uncertainty

simulation_runs_value.description: Number of simulation runs used in a numerical uncertainty propagation

software_reference_value.description: Software, workflow, script, or computational environment used for uncertainty evaluation

uncertainty_standards_applied_value.description: Standard, guide, or protocol applied in the uncertainty evaluation

uncertainty_statement_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the uncertainty statement

PropagationAnalysis.title: PropagationAnalysis

PropagationMethodEnum.description: Methods for uncertainty combination or propagation
PropagationMethodEnum.title: PropagationMethodEnum

QualityAggregation.description: Aggregation of assessments, profiles, criterion scores, metrics, or uncertainty translations across values, records, datasets, or indicators

aggregation_identifier_value.description: Identifier for an aggregation of data quality assessments, profiles, criteria, metrics, or uncertainty translations

aggregation_input_references_value.description: References to the input assessments, profiles, criteria, metrics, or data sources used in the aggregation

aggregation_level_value.description: Level at which aggregation is performed

aggregation_method_value.description: Method used to aggregate criterion scores or lower-level assessments into a profile

aggregation_output_reference_value.description: Reference to the output assessment, profile, score, uncertainty translation, or decision produced by the aggregation

aggregation_rationale_value.description: Rationale for the aggregation method and weighting choices

aggregation_weights_value.description: Weights or weighting rule used in the aggregation

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

QualityAggregation.title: QualityAggregation

QualityCriterionAssessment.description: Criterion-level assessment for a data quality dimension such as validity, accuracy, consistency, timeliness, or completeness

criterion_assessment_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a criterion-level quality assessment

criterion_impact_value.description: Impact of this criterion on the intended use, uncertainty, bias, comparability, or decision

criterion_metric_value.description: Metric value, observation, or diagnostic result used to support the criterion score

criterion_numeric_score_value.description: Numeric criterion score when the score is represented as a number

criterion_rationale_value.description: Rationale for assigning the criterion score

criterion_score_value.description: Pedigree score assigned to a quality criterion

criterion_threshold_value.description: Threshold, rule, target, or expectation used to score the criterion

criterion_weight_value.description: Weight assigned to the criterion in an aggregation or decision rule

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

quality_issues.description: Data quality issues, limitations, anomalies, or risks

quality_metrics.description: Quality metrics or diagnostic metrics used by profiles, criteria, or diagnostics

uncertainty_translation.description: DQA-to-uncertainty translation associated with an assessment or profile

QualityCriterionAssessment.title: QualityCriterionAssessment

QualityCriterionEnum.description: Data quality criteria supported by the framework
QualityCriterionEnum.title: QualityCriterionEnum

QualityDiagnostic.description: Diagnostic run or analysis that compares data against expectations, detects deviations, infers causes, and estimates impact

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

diagnostic_cause_value.description: Plausible or confirmed cause of the observed diagnostic finding

diagnostic_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a diagnostic run, check, or analysis

diagnostic_impact_value.description: Impact of the diagnostic finding on the intended analysis, decision, uncertainty, or comparability

diagnostic_method_value.description: Diagnostic method, test, script, notebook, query, or procedure used

diagnostic_reproducibility_value.description: Information needed to reproduce the diagnostic run, such as pinned dependencies, configuration, hash, or workflow version

diagnostic_run_timestamp_value.description: Date and time when the diagnostic run was executed

diagnostic_software_reference_value.description: Software, notebook, workflow, configuration, or service used to execute the diagnostic

expectation_specification_value.description: Expected value, threshold, rule, contract, baseline, or target used by the diagnostic

observed_deviation_value.description: Observed deviation from the expectation, threshold, baseline, or target

quality_issues.description: Data quality issues, limitations, anomalies, or risks

quality_metrics.description: Quality metrics or diagnostic metrics used by profiles, criteria, or diagnostics

QualityDiagnostic.title: QualityDiagnostic

QualityFlagEnum.description: Operational decision flags derived from quality scores
QualityFlagEnum.title: QualityFlagEnum

QualityIssue.description: Data quality issue, limitation, anomaly, or risk identified through scoring, diagnostics, provenance review, or expert assessment

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

data_quality_uncertainty_reference_value.description: Reference to an uncertainty statement, uncertainty budget, or uncertainty component informed by this data quality assessment

issue_affected_criteria_value.description: Quality criteria affected by the issue

issue_detected_date_value.description: Date when the issue was detected

issue_risk_statement_value.description: Risk statement explaining how the issue may affect the intended use, decision, or analysis

issue_root_cause_value.description: Root cause, suspected cause, or causal inference for the issue

issue_scope_value.description: Scope of the issue, such as affected fields, records, time periods, regions, suppliers, or processes

issue_severity_value.description: Severity or criticality of the data quality issue

issue_status_value.description: Lifecycle status of the data quality issue

quality_issue_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a data quality issue, limitation, anomaly, or risk

remediation_actions.description: Remediation, mitigation, containment, or improvement actions

QualityIssue.title: QualityIssue

QualityMetric.description: Metric, indicator, diagnostic output, threshold check, or quality measurement supporting a criterion score

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

metric_method_value.description: Method, query, diagnostic procedure, rule, or script used to compute the metric

metric_numeric_value.description: Numeric value of a metric, indicator, diagnostic output, or score

metric_pass_flag_value.description: Whether the metric passes the defined threshold or expectation

metric_text_value.description: Textual, categorical, or structured value of a metric, indicator, diagnostic output, or score

metric_threshold_value.description: Threshold, tolerance, expectation, or acceptance criterion for the metric

metric_unit_value.description: Unit associated with a metric value

quality_metric_category_value.description: Category or criterion to which the quality metric belongs

quality_metric_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a data quality metric or diagnostic metric

quality_metric_name_value.description: Human-readable name of the data quality metric

QualityMetric.title: QualityMetric

QualityScoreEnum.description: Pedigree score scale for data quality
QualityScoreEnum.title: QualityScoreEnum

QuantityValue.description: Reported value or estimate associated with an uncertainty statement

numeric_value_value.description: Numeric value associated with a reported result, estimate, distribution parameter, or uncertainty quantity

text_value_value.description: Textual, categorical, or structured value when the result is not represented as a simple number

uncertainty_unit_value.description: Unit associated with a reported result, estimate, distribution parameter, or uncertainty quantity

value_source_value.description: Source of the value, such as measurement, calculation, supplier declaration, literature, or simulation

value_timestamp_value.description: Date and time associated with the value

RecoveryOperationEnum.description: Recovery operations aligned with EU Waste Framework Directive 2008/98/EC Annex II. Distinct from disposal operations (see DisposalMethodEnum).

RecyclingEvent.description: Material and product recovery and recycling details

recovery_operation.description: Recovery operation performed, aligned with WFD Annex II (separates recycling, preparation for re-use, and energy recovery)

recovery_percentage.description: Recovery rate as a percentage (0-100) for the recovery_operation, per WFD Annex II. Recovery is broader than recycling - distinct from the recycling-specific rate in circularity-and-eol (RecyclableMaterials.recycling_rate).

recycling_data_quality_assessments.description: Optional data quality assessments for recycling event data, recovery evidence, provenance, completeness, or representativeness

recycling_metrological_traceability_stat.description: Optional metrological traceability statements for recycling measurements, recovery calculations, methods, standards, calibrations, or reference materials

recycling_uncertainty_statements.description: Optional uncertainty statements for recovered material quantities, recovery percentages, or estimated recycling outputs

assigned_value_value.description: Assigned value of a measurement standard, reference material, calibrator, or conventional reference

reference_entity_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a reference entity, material, standard, instrument, facility, method, or dataset

traceability_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a certificate, report, procedure, dataset, standard, or software record

certified_property_value.description: Certified or assigned property of the reference material

reference_material_lot_value.description: Lot, batch, serial number, or production identifier of the reference material

new_part_number.description: Part number of the installed replacement part

sensitivity_parameter_value.description: Input, parameter, or component assessed in a sensitivity analysis

sensitivity_rank_value.description: Rank of an input, parameter, or component according to sensitivity or uncertainty contribution

sensitivity_value_value.description: Numeric value of a sensitivity metric

TraceabilityBasis.description: Reference basis to which a result is related, such as an SI realization, measurement standard, reference material, standard method, or boundary definition

common_reference_name_value.description: Name of the final common reference

common_reference_uri_value.description: URI or URL identifying the final common reference

reference_authority_value.description: Authority, organization, metrology institute, standards body, or publisher responsible for the reference

reference_scope_value.description: Scope or field of application for the reference

reference_used_date_value.description: Date at which the reference was used to establish the traceability hierarchy

reference_version_value.description: Version, edition, revision, or publication date of the reference

traceability_basis_type_value.description: Type of reference basis used to establish traceability

traceability_uncertainty_reference_value.description: Reference to an uncertainty statement, uncertainty budget, or uncertainty component associated with this traceability record

aggregation_events.description: Packaging hierarchy operations - packing and unpacking of items into containers

entity_history.description: Foundation for all lifecycle events with complete audit trail for products, materials, batches, or commodities

TraceabilityLink.description: Single documented step in a traceability chain, including calibration, comparison, transfer, method adherence, or boundary reference

calibration_records.description: Calibration, comparison, verification, or check records that support traceability

link_date_value.description: Date on which this traceability link, calibration, comparison, transformation, or modelling step was established

link_from_reference_value.description: Reference entity, value, standard, method, or node from which this link starts

link_procedure_value.description: Procedure, calibration, comparison, transformation, conversion, or modelling step used in this link

link_role_value.description: Role of the traceability link in the chain

link_sequence_value.description: Position of the link in the traceability chain, where lower numbers are closer to the reported result

link_to_reference_value.description: Reference entity, value, standard, method, or node to which this link points

link_uncertainty_reference_value.description: Reference to the uncertainty contribution associated with this traceability link

traceability_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a certificate, report, procedure, dataset, standard, or software record

traceability_link_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a step, edge, or link in a traceability chain

traceability_statement_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the traceability statement

TraceabilityStatement.description: Reusable statement documenting the traceability basis of a measured, calculated, method-defined, or boundary-defined value

boundary_definition.description: Boundary, goal-and-scope, scenario, or model definition used to define a modelled value

calibration_records.description: Calibration, comparison, verification, or check records that support traceability

competence_records.description: Competence, accreditation, validation, or quality system records supporting traceability

measurement_procedure.description: Procedure or method used to define, obtain, transfer, or compare the value

measurement_standards.description: Measurement standards, artefacts, instruments, and realizations used in traceability

reference_entities.description: Reference entities, standards, methods, instruments, datasets, or organizations used in traceability

reference_materials.description: Reference materials and certified reference materials used in traceability

reported_value_identifier_value.description: Identifier for the reported measured, calculated, or assessed value

reported_value_unit_value.description: Unit associated with the reported value

reported_value_value.description: Reported value to which the traceability statement applies

result_date_value.description: Date or time at which the reported result was generated, measured, calculated, or issued

traceability_applies_to_class_value.description: Class in an external model to which this traceability statement applies

traceability_applies_to_model_value.description: Name, URI, or namespace of the external data model to which this traceability statement applies

traceability_applies_to_record_value.description: Identifier of the external record, object, dataset, or passport entry to which this traceability statement applies

traceability_applies_to_slot_value.description: Slot or attribute in an external model to which this traceability statement applies

traceability_applies_to_value_identifier.description: Identifier of a specific value object when the target model gives value-level identifiers

traceability_applies_to_value_path_value.description: JSONPath, XPath, RDF path, or other pointer to the value to which this traceability statement applies

traceability_basis.description: Reference basis that establishes the meaning and comparability of the value

traceability_chain.description: Traceability chain or network that relates the result to a reference

traceability_data_quality_reference_valu.description: Reference to a data quality assessment associated with this traceability record

traceability_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a certificate, report, procedure, dataset, standard, or software record

traceability_measurand_description_value.description: Operational definition of the measurand, including what is measured, calculated, or assessed

traceability_measurand_identifier_value.description: Identifier for the measurand, quantity, indicator, or value of interest

traceability_measurand_name_value.description: Name of the measurand, quantity, indicator, or value of interest

traceability_quantity_kind_value.description: Kind of quantity or indicator being traced, such as mass, length, concentration, carbon footprint, or circularity indicator

traceability_quantity_unit_value.description: Unit in which the value or measurand is expressed

traceability_standards_applied_value.description: Standard, guide, protocol, or normative document applied when establishing traceability

traceability_statement_date_value.description: Date and time when the traceability statement was issued or last updated

traceability_statement_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a metrological traceability statement that can be referenced from another CE-RISE model

traceability_statement_label_value.description: Human-readable label for the traceability statement

traceability_statement_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the traceability statement

traceability_status_value.description: Lifecycle or validity status of the traceability statement

traceability_uncertainty_reference_value.description: Reference to an uncertainty statement, uncertainty budget, or uncertainty component associated with this traceability record

UncertaintyBudget.description: Statement of uncertainty components, their calculation, and their combination

budget_method_value.description: Method used to combine uncertainty components

combined_standard_uncertainty_value.description: Combined standard uncertainty obtained from the individual uncertainty components

correlations.description: Correlations or covariances between input quantities or components

coverage_factor_value.description: Coverage factor used to obtain expanded uncertainty from combined standard uncertainty

coverage_interval.description: Coverage interval or other interval representation of uncertainty

coverage_probability_value.description: Coverage probability associated with a coverage interval or expanded uncertainty

effective_degrees_of_freedom_value.description: Effective degrees of freedom associated with the combined uncertainty

expanded_uncertainty_value.description: Expanded uncertainty obtained by multiplying combined standard uncertainty by a coverage factor

input_quantities.description: Input quantities in the measurement or calculation model

measurement_model_value.description: Measurement model, calculation model, statistical model, or equation relating inputs to the measurand

relative_standard_uncertainty_value.description: Standard uncertainty divided by the absolute value of the associated quantity value

uncertainty_budget_name_value.description: Human-readable name of the uncertainty budget

uncertainty_components.description: Individual uncertainty components included in an uncertainty budget

uncertainty_standards_applied_value.description: Standard, guide, or protocol applied in the uncertainty evaluation

uncertainty_statement_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the uncertainty statement

UncertaintyBudget.title: UncertaintyBudget

UncertaintyComponent.description: Individual contribution to uncertainty from a source, input, bias, model discrepancy, scenario, or data quality limitation

coefficient_of_variation_value.description: Coefficient of variation used as a relative uncertainty measure

component_estimate_value.description: Best estimate associated with an uncertainty component

coverage_factor_value.description: Coverage factor used to obtain expanded uncertainty from combined standard uncertainty

degrees_of_freedom_value.description: Degrees of freedom associated with an uncertainty component or estimate

evaluation_type_value.description: Type of evaluation used for the uncertainty component

relative_standard_uncertainty_value.description: Standard uncertainty divided by the absolute value of the associated quantity value

sensitivity_coefficient_value.description: Sensitivity coefficient describing how the measurand responds to this input or component

standard_uncertainty_value.description: Standard uncertainty expressed as a standard deviation

uncertainty_component_factor_value.description: Multiplicative uncertainty factor used to express a plausible range around a positive quantity

uncertainty_data_quality_reference_value.description: Reference to a data quality assessment that informs or justifies an uncertainty contribution

uncertainty_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a certificate, report, dataset, standard, or software record

uncertainty_source_value.description: Description or name of the uncertainty source

uncertainty_statement_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the uncertainty statement

uncertainty_traceability_reference_value.description: Reference to a metrological traceability statement, chain, method, calibration, or boundary definition

UncertaintyComponent.title: UncertaintyComponent

UncertaintyDistribution.description: Probability distribution representing uncertainty for a measurand, input quantity, component, or model output

distribution_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a probability distribution used in the uncertainty evaluation

distribution_location_value.description: Location parameter of the probability distribution when applicable

distribution_lower_bound_value.description: Lower support bound of the probability distribution

distribution_notes_value.description: Notes about distribution choice, fitting, assumptions, or limitations

distribution_parameters.description: Flexible distribution parameters, such as mean, standard deviation, minimum, maximum, shape, or scale

distribution_scale_value.description: Scale parameter of the probability distribution when applicable

distribution_standard_deviation_value.description: Standard deviation of the probability distribution

distribution_type_value.description: Type of probability distribution used to describe uncertainty

distribution_upper_bound_value.description: Upper support bound of the probability distribution

empirical_values_reference_value.description: Reference to empirical samples or tabulated values used to define an empirical distribution

UncertaintyDistribution.title: UncertaintyDistribution

UncertaintyEvidenceReference.description: Reference to supporting evidence used to define, justify, or update uncertainty

uncertainty_evidence_provider_value.description: Provider, author, laboratory, supplier, or organization responsible for supporting evidence

uncertainty_evidence_version_value.description: Version, edition, or revision of supporting evidence

UncertaintyEvidenceReference.title: UncertaintyEvidenceReference

UncertaintyEvidenceTypeEnum.description: Types of supporting evidence for uncertainty evaluation
UncertaintyEvidenceTypeEnum.title: UncertaintyEvidenceTypeEnum

UncertaintyInterval.description: Interval representation of uncertainty, including coverage intervals and percentile intervals

coverage_factor_value.description: Coverage factor used to obtain expanded uncertainty from combined standard uncertainty

coverage_probability_value.description: Coverage probability associated with a coverage interval or expanded uncertainty

interval_type_value.description: Type of interval used to communicate uncertainty

lower_bound_value.description: Lower bound of an uncertainty interval, coverage interval, or plausible range

percentile_lower_value.description: Lower percentile used to define an interval, such as 5 for a 5th percentile bound

percentile_upper_value.description: Upper percentile used to define an interval, such as 95 for a 95th percentile bound

uncertainty_unit_value.description: Unit associated with a reported result, estimate, distribution parameter, or uncertainty quantity

upper_bound_value.description: Upper bound of an uncertainty interval, coverage interval, or plausible range

UncertaintyInterval.title: UncertaintyInterval

UncertaintyQuantification.description: Root container for uncertainty quantification statements and supporting records

comparison_assessments.description: Assessments of whether uncertainty statements support meaningful comparison

method_references.description: Methods, standards, and protocols referenced by the uncertainty model

propagation_analyses.description: Propagation analyses available for reuse by one or more uncertainty statements

uncertainty_budgets.description: Uncertainty budgets available for reuse by one or more uncertainty statements

uncertainty_evidence_references.description: Evidence records referenced by the uncertainty model

uncertainty_statements.description: Reusable uncertainty statements that can be embedded or referenced by other CE-RISE data models

UncertaintyStatement.description: Reusable statement describing uncertainty for a reported value, field, dataset, model output, or comparison

coverage_interval.description: Coverage interval or other interval representation of uncertainty

measurand.description: Operational definition of the measurand or value of interest

propagation_analysis.description: Propagation or numerical analysis used to derive an uncertainty statement

reported_value.description: Reported value to which the uncertainty statement applies, when represented in this utility model

uncertainty_applies_to_class_value.description: Class in an external model to which this uncertainty statement applies

uncertainty_applies_to_model_value.description: Name, URI, or namespace of the external data model to which this uncertainty statement applies

uncertainty_applies_to_record_value.description: Identifier of the external record, object, dataset, or passport entry to which this uncertainty statement applies

uncertainty_applies_to_slot_value.description: Slot or attribute in an external model to which this uncertainty statement applies

uncertainty_applies_to_value_identifier_.description: Identifier of a specific value object when the target model gives value-level identifiers

uncertainty_applies_to_value_path_value.description: JSONPath, XPath, RDF path, or other pointer to the value to which this uncertainty statement applies

uncertainty_budget.description: Uncertainty budget used to calculate or justify an uncertainty statement

uncertainty_data_quality_reference_value.description: Reference to a data quality assessment that informs or justifies an uncertainty contribution

uncertainty_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a certificate, report, dataset, standard, or software record

uncertainty_standards_applied_value.description: Standard, guide, or protocol applied in the uncertainty evaluation

uncertainty_statement_date_value.description: Date and time when the uncertainty statement was issued or last updated

uncertainty_statement_identifier_value.description: Identifier for an uncertainty statement that can be referenced from another CE-RISE model

uncertainty_statement_label_value.description: Human-readable label for the uncertainty statement

uncertainty_statement_notes_value.description: Additional notes about the uncertainty statement

uncertainty_statement_status_value.description: Lifecycle status of the uncertainty statement

uncertainty_traceability_reference_value.description: Reference to a metrological traceability statement, chain, method, calibration, or boundary definition

UncertaintyStatement.title: UncertaintyStatement

UncertaintyStatementTypeEnum.description: Types of uncertainty statement supported by the model
UncertaintyStatementTypeEnum.title: UncertaintyStatementTypeEnum

UncertaintyTranslation.description: Translation from data quality information into uncertainty metadata, such as coefficient of variation or uncertainty factor

coefficient_of_variation_lower_value.description: Lower bound of coefficient of variation derived from data quality information

coefficient_of_variation_upper_value.description: Upper bound of coefficient of variation derived from data quality information

combined_coefficient_of_variation_value.description: Combined coefficient of variation after aggregating data-quality-derived uncertainty contributions

combined_uncertainty_factor_value.description: Combined uncertainty factor after aggregating data-quality-derived uncertainty contributions

data_quality_evidence_reference_value.description: Reference to supporting evidence such as a report, dataset, diagnostic output, certificate, standard, or workflow record

data_quality_uncertainty_factor_value.description: Uncertainty factor derived from data quality information

data_quality_uncertainty_reference_value.description: Reference to an uncertainty statement, uncertainty budget, or uncertainty component informed by this data quality assessment

source_quality_score_value.description: Quality score used as input to the uncertainty translation

uncertainty_distribution_assumption_valu.description: Distributional assumption used for data-quality-derived uncertainty, such as normal or lognormal

uncertainty_translation_identifier_value.description: Identifier for a translation from data quality scores to uncertainty information

uncertainty_translation_method_value.description: Method used to translate data quality information into uncertainty

uncertainty_translation_rationale_value.description: Rationale explaining how data quality information was translated into uncertainty

UncertaintyTranslation.title: UncertaintyTranslation

UncertaintyTranslationMethodEnum.description: Methods for translating data quality into uncertainty
UncertaintyTranslationMethodEnum.title: UncertaintyTranslationMethodEnum

ValueAddingActivityLocation.description: Transformation and processing events extending EPCIS TransformationEvent

activity_date.description: When activity occurred - aligns with EPCIS eventTime concept

activity_identifier.description: Unique activity reference - aligns with EPCIS eventID concept

activity_type.description: Uses CBV BizStep vocabulary directly - commissioning transformation decommissioning

batch_identifier.description: Batch or lot number for this processing run

facility_identifier.description: GLN or OSID of processing facility

input_entities.description: Input entities (components, materials, batches, commodities) consumed in transformation - aligns with EPCIS inputEPCList

operator_identifier.description: GLN or ID of operator performing activity

output_entities.description: Output entities (products, materials, batches, commodities) resulting from transformation - aligns with EPCIS outputEPCList

process_certification.description: URI references to process certifications ISO standards or quality systems

process_description.description: Detailed transformation process description EPCIS extension

process_duration.description: Process duration in ISO 8601 format (e.g. PT30M for 30 minutes)

process_step.description: Specific process step within transformation EPCIS bizStep

quality_check_performed.description: Whether quality control was performed DPP extension

quality_check_performed_value.description: Value holder for quality check flag

quality_check_results.description: Quality control test results DPP extension

value_added.description: Economic value added by this activity DPP extension

value_adding_activity_data_quality_asses.description: Optional data quality assessments for transformation and processing event data, quality checks, evidence, provenance, completeness, or representativeness

value_adding_activity_metrological_trace.description: Optional metrological traceability statements for quality checks, process measurements, methods, standards, calibrations, or reference materials

value_adding_activity_uncertainty_statem.description: Optional uncertainty statements for measured, estimated, or quality-checked transformation and processing values

ValueAddingActivityLocation.title: ValueAddingActivityLocation

ValueTypeEnum.description: Types of values that may carry uncertainty
ValueTypeEnum.title: ValueTypeEnum

description: Root container for all traceability and lifecycle events for products, materials, batches, or commodities throughout their supply chain journey

actor_tracking.description: All supply chain participants and their interactions with entities (products, materials, batches, commodities)

aggregation_events.description: Packaging hierarchy operations - packing and unpacking of items into containers

entity_history.description: Foundation for all lifecycle events with complete audit trail for products, materials, batches, or commodities

logistics_events.description: Supply chain transportation and movement tracking post-import

ownership_event.description: Legal ownership and custody transfers throughout supply chain

physical_custody.description: In-workshop physical custody handoffs (e.g. intake, storage, bench, data wipe, QA, resale), distinct from legal ownership

supply_chain_incidents.description: Exception events and disruptions during supply chain operations

value_adding_activity.description: Transformation and processing events that modify or enhance entities (products, materials, batches, commodities)

title: traceability_and_life_cycle_events
